name: io.zvid/mcp
title: Zvid
description: Official Zvid MCP server — render videos & images from JSON and manage templates, projects, webhooks and credits, from Claude, Cursor, Codex, n8n or any Model Context Protocol client.

environmentVariables.name: ZVID_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Zvid API key (format zvid_…). Create one at https://app.zvid.io.

environmentVariables.name: ZVID_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Zvid orchestrator base URL. Defaults to https://api.zvid.io.
